entry: Stand tall with your feet together and arms by your sides.
Ground down through all four corners of each foot.
hold: Lengthen through the crown of your head.
Soften your shoulders away from your ears.
cues.exit: Take one full breath in and out.

entry: Sweep your arms out and up overhead.
Press your palms together or keep them shoulder width.
hold: Reach up through your fingertips.
Keep your ribs soft and your gaze forward.
cues.exit: Release your arms back down by your sides.

entry: Hinge at your hips and fold forward.
Let your head and arms hang heavy.
hold: Bend your knees as much as you need.
With each exhale, release a little deeper.
cues.exit: Rise up slowly, one vertebra at a time.

entry: From your fold, slide your hands up your shins.
Lift your chest to a flat back.
hold: Lengthen from your tailbone to the crown of your head.
Draw your shoulder blades together.
cues.exit: Fold back down over your legs.

entry: Bend your knees and sink your hips back like sitting into a chair.
Sweep your arms up alongside your ears.
hold: Keep your weight in your heels.
Lift your chest and drop your shoulders.
cues.exit: Press through your feet to stand tall.

entry: Plant your palms shoulder width apart and lift your hips high.
Make an upside-down V with your body.
hold: Press the floor away and let your head hang.
Pedal your heels toward the mat, one at a time.
cues.exit: Lower your knees softly to the mat.

entry: Come to the top of a push-up, shoulders over wrists.
Make one straight line from head to heels.
hold: Press the floor away and hug your belly in.
Reach back through your heels.
cues.exit: Lower your knees to the mat with control.

entry: Step one foot forward between your hands.
Lower your back knee to the mat and sweep your arms up.
hold: Sink your hips forward and down.
Feel the stretch along the front of your back hip.
cues.exit: Frame your front foot with your hands and step back.

entry: Step one foot forward and stay high on your back toes.
Bend your front knee over your ankle and reach your arms up.
hold: Press back through your back heel.
Square your hips toward the front of your mat.
cues.exit: Lower your hands and step back to your fold or plank.

entry: Ground your back heel at a forty-five degree angle.
Bend your front knee and reach both arms overhead.
hold: Draw your back hip forward to square your hips.
Sink deeper into your front leg with each exhale.
cues.exit: Straighten your front leg and release your arms.

entry: Open your hips and shoulders to the side of your mat.
Extend your arms long, front and back.
hold: Stack your front knee over your ankle.
Gaze softly over your front fingertips.
cues.exit: Straighten your front leg and windmill your hands down.

entry: From Warrior Two, flip your front palm and reach up and back.
Slide your back hand down your back leg.
hold: Keep your front knee bent and heavy.
Breathe length into your side body.
cues.exit: Return to Warrior Two.

entry: From Warrior Two, bring your front forearm to your thigh.
Reach your top arm over your ear.
hold: Make one long line from your back heel to your fingertips.
Roll your chest open toward the ceiling.
cues.exit: Press into your feet and rise back to Warrior Two.

entry: Straighten your front leg and reach forward.
Tilt at the hip and bring your hand to your shin or a block.
hold: Stack your shoulders and reach your top arm to the sky.
Keep both sides of your waist long.
cues.exit: Press into your feet and lift your torso upright.

entry: Shorten your stance and square both hips forward.
Fold over your straight front leg.
hold: Keep a soft bend in your front knee.
Draw your chest toward your shin with each exhale.
cues.exit: Rise with a flat back and step your feet together.

entry: Shift your weight into one foot.
Place your other foot on your ankle, calf, or inner thigh — never the knee.
hold: Press your foot and leg into each other.
Find one still point to rest your gaze.
cues.exit: Slowly lower your foot back to the mat.

entry: Wrap one leg over the other and sink your hips.
Cross the opposite arm under and wrap your forearms.
hold: Lift your elbows and sink your hips a little lower.
Squeeze everything toward your midline.
cues.exit: Unwind slowly and shake out your arms and legs.

entry: Catch the inside of one ankle behind you.
Reach your other arm forward for balance.
hold: Kick your foot into your hand and let your chest lift.
Keep your standing leg strong.
cues.exit: Release your ankle gently and return to standing.

entry: Cross one ankle over the opposite thigh.
Sit your hips back like a one-legged chair.
hold: Flex your lifted foot to protect your knee.
Keep your chest tall as your hips sink.
cues.exit: Rise up and release your leg with control.

entry: Step your feet wide and parallel.
Hinge at your hips and fold forward.
hold: Bring your hands to the floor or a block.
Let the crown of your head sink toward the mat.
cues.exit: Hands to hips, rise up with a flat back.

entry: Step wide and turn your toes out.
Bend your knees deeply and bring your arms to cactus.
hold: Track your knees over your toes.
Keep your tailbone tucked and your torso tall.
cues.exit: Straighten your legs and step your feet together.

entry: From Triangle, bend your front knee and step your back foot in.
Float your back leg up as your fingertips find the floor or a block.
hold: Stack your hips and open your chest to the side.
Reach your top arm high and flex your lifted foot.
cues.exit: Soften your front knee and lower your back leg with control.

entry: Come to hands and knees, shoulders over wrists.
Exhale and round your spine to the ceiling.
hold: Tuck your chin and your tailbone.
Press the floor away between your shoulder blades.
cues.exit: Return to a flat, neutral back.

entry: From hands and knees, inhale and drop your belly.
Lift your chest and tailbone toward the ceiling.
hold: Draw your shoulders away from your ears.
Let your gaze lift gently, without crunching your neck.
cues.exit: Return to a flat, neutral back.

entry: From hands and knees, slide one arm under your chest.
Rest your shoulder and ear on the mat.
hold: Let the twist wring out your upper back.
Soften the weight of your body into the floor.
cues.exit: Press into your top hand to unwind back to all fours.

entry: Keep your hips over your knees and walk your hands forward.
Melt your chest and forehead toward the mat.
hold: Keep your arms active, palms pressing down.
Breathe into the stretch across your chest and shoulders.
cues.exit: Walk your hands back under your shoulders.

entry: Lie on your belly with palms under your shoulders.
Press gently to peel your chest off the mat.
hold: Keep your elbows hugging your ribs.
Lengthen through the back of your neck.
cues.exit: Lower down slowly, one rib at a time.

entry: Press through your palms and straighten your arms.
Lift your chest and your thighs off the mat.
hold: Roll your shoulders back and open your collarbones.
Press the tops of your feet down.
cues.exit: Roll over your toes or lower down to your belly.

entry: Lie on your belly and prop up on your forearms.
Stack your elbows under your shoulders.
hold: Press your forearms down and lengthen your chest forward.
Relax your glutes and let your lower back soften.
cues.exit: Slide your arms forward and lower to the mat.

entry: Lie on your belly with arms alongside your body.
Lift your chest, arms, and legs off the mat.
hold: Reach your fingertips toward your heels.
Keep your gaze down to protect your neck.
cues.exit: Lower everything down and rest one cheek on the mat.

entry: Bend your knees and catch the outside of your ankles.
Kick your feet back to lift your chest and thighs.
hold: Keep your knees hip width apart.
Balance on the soft part of your belly and breathe.
cues.exit: Release your ankles gently and lower down.

entry: Bring your big toes together and knees wide.
Sink your hips back to your heels and reach your arms forward.
hold: Rest your forehead on the mat.
Let each exhale soften your back a little more.
cues.exit: Walk your hands in and rise up slowly.

entry: Sit tall with your legs extended.
Hinge at your hips and reach for your shins or feet.
hold: Keep your spine long rather than rounding hard.
Soften your knees as much as you need.
cues.exit: Roll up slowly to sitting.

entry: Extend one leg and tuck the other foot to your inner thigh.
Square your chest over the long leg and fold.
hold: Lead with your heart, not your head.
Keep the extended foot flexed toward the ceiling.
cues.exit: Rise up slowly and switch sides when cued.

entry: Cross one foot over the opposite thigh.
Hug your knee and lengthen your spine tall.
hold: Inhale to grow taller, exhale to twist a little deeper.
Keep both sit bones grounded.
cues.exit: Unwind on an exhale and face forward.

entry: Bring the soles of your feet together.
Let your knees fall open like book pages.
hold: Hold your feet and sit tall, or fold forward.
Let gravity do the work on your inner thighs.
cues.exit: Support your knees with your hands as you bring them together.

entry: Bring one shin forward and lay it across the mat.
Extend your back leg long behind you.
hold: Square your hips and fold over your front shin.
Breathe into the deep stretch in your outer hip.
cues.exit: Press into your hands and step your front leg back.

entry: Step one foot to the outside of your hands.
Lower your back knee and come down to your forearms if you can.
hold: Let your front knee open slightly to the side.
Keep your chest reaching forward.
cues.exit: Press up to your palms and step back.

entry: From a low lunge, shift your hips back over your back knee.
Straighten your front leg and flex the foot.
hold: Keep your hips square and fold over the straight leg.
Stay long through your spine.
cues.exit: Bend your front knee and return to your lunge.

entry: Lie on your back and hug your knees in.
Grab the outsides of your feet and open your knees wide.
hold: Draw your knees toward your armpits.
Keep your tailbone heavy on the mat.
cues.exit: Release your feet and hug your knees to your chest.

entry: Lie on your back and draw one knee to your chest.
Guide it across your body toward the floor.
hold: Open your opposite arm wide and soften your shoulder down.
Let your breath slow and deepen.
cues.exit: Draw your knee back to center on an inhale.

entry: Lie on your back with knees bent, feet hip width.
Press into your feet and lift your hips.
hold: Roll your shoulders under and keep your knees tracking forward.
Lift your chest toward your chin, not your chin to your chest.
cues.exit: Lower your spine down slowly, one vertebra at a time.

entry: Lie on your back and cross one ankle over the opposite thigh.
Thread your hands behind that thigh and draw it in.
hold: Flex your crossed foot to protect your knee.
Keep your head and shoulders relaxed on the mat.
cues.exit: Release your legs gently back to the floor.

entry: Sit close to a wall and swing your legs up it.
Let your arms rest open by your sides.
hold: Let the wall hold the full weight of your legs.
Soften your face, jaw, and belly.
cues.exit: Bend your knees and roll to one side before sitting up.

entry: Balance on your sit bones and lift your shins parallel to the floor.
Reach your arms forward alongside your knees.
hold: Lift through your chest — don't let your back round.
Straighten your legs for more challenge, or hold behind your thighs for less.
cues.exit: Lower your feet down with control.

entry: Kneel with your hips over your knees, hands on your low back.
Lift your chest and arch back; reach for your heels if it's there today.
hold: Keep pressing your hips forward over your knees.
Let your chest lead the backbend, not your neck.
cues.exit: Bring your hands to your low back and rise up slowly.

entry: Kneel and sit between your heels, or on a block.
Rest your hands on your thighs.
hold: Grow tall through your spine.
Let your breath settle into an easy rhythm.
cues.exit: Come forward to hands and knees and stretch your legs out.

entry: Lie flat on your back, legs long, arms by your sides.
Let your feet fall open and your palms turn up.
hold: Release control of your breath.
Let your whole body become heavy on the mat.
cues.exit: Wiggle your fingers and toes, then roll to one side and rise.

entry: Reach both arms overhead and catch one wrist.
Lean gently away from the caught wrist.
hold: Keep both feet grounded and hips level.
Breathe into the long side of your ribs.
cues.exit: Rise back to center on an inhale.

entry: From all fours, walk your hands far forward.
Keep your hips high and let your chest melt down.
hold: Settle in — this is a long, quiet hold.
Soften a little more with every exhale.
cues.exit: Walk your hands back and sit onto your heels.

entry: Step one foot forward into a deep, long lunge.
Let your back knee rest on the mat.
hold: Sink your hips low and let gravity open the front of your hip.
Stay soft — no pushing, just time.
cues.exit: Press up slowly and step back with care.
